blocker: Fireball-transfer arm not runnable: FIREBALL D&D dataset not vendored, project is frozen-LLM (no fine-tuning/transfer stack), and D&D is off-domain for SRE; harness wired to score a real export at --fireball-jsonl if provided
one_line: Built+ran the synthetic-SRE-augmentation arm (deterministic offline augmenter over 51 CIDG scenarios -> 204 groups/816 FIREBALL-schema trajectories, every group with within-group reward spread, self-test 9/9) plus a head-to-head harness scoring both arms; synthetic wins the data-quality/seeding verdict while the Fireball arm is documented as blocked
